data.body: [enwiki] John Otunba Payne — The sources are deep in academic books and old newspapers. You can consult Christopher Fyfe's "A History of Sierra Leone" pg. 459 or read his obituary published in SLWN Jan 26 1907. Also he spelled his name Otonba not Otunba (see the cover page of his 1894 Almanack). Also the Ijebu Ode royal family biography of his family is likely made up; Yes, his father was from Ijebu but it wasn't unlikely for "Saro" returnees to claim royal heritage.
data.author: Wayn12
data.title: John Otunba Payne
